effects.effect: Play this card as a Vivosaur into one of your Vivosaur zones (200LP/Neutral/CLOSE/[Machine]) with this ability:

effects.name: Scary Machine!
effects.effect: Neither player can apply statuses to this Vivosaur. Neither player gets a KO Point if this Vivosaur is defeated. Your opponent cannot use Attack Skills on Vivosaurs, except "Scary Monster Machine!". If this Vivosaur is KO'd by an Opponent's attacking Vivosaur: deal 150 damage to that Vivosaur.
